title: Pin comment to the top within a file
excerpt: My team would like the ability to pin a comment to the top within a PDF file. This is how we review work and it would be beneficial to be able to pin important notes to the top. This is something only available in the up…

posts.author: Hannah_Albert (Hannah Albert)
posts.cookedHtml: My team would like the ability to pin a comment to the top within a PDF file. This is how we review work and it would be beneficial to be able to pin important notes to the top. This is something only available in the updates section, but the pins do not get carried over to the comment within the file.
